title: Jlhuemoe
compiled_truth: Jlhuemoe is an external contact at [Llgm](companies/llgm). Over the corpus period (2001-03-09 to 2001-06-07), Jlhuemoe sent 3 and received 22 emails, totalling 25 interactions.
